name: encuestas-universitarias
description: Plataforma full stack para gestion de encuestas de rutas universitarias

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/admin-web
scripts.check: npm run check --workspace apps/api && npm run check --workspace apps/admin-web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace apps/api && npm run test --workspace apps/admin-web
